sections.paragraph:
ἶρις, ιδος, ἡ (also ἴρεω as gen.)

① rainbow (Hom. et al.): ApcPt 3:10 (Mel., fgm, 8b 11); Rv 4:3; 10:1.

② an arc or circle of light, whether colored or not, halo, radiance (Aristot., Meteor. 3, 4; 5; Theophr., Ostent. 1, 13; Lucian, Dom. 11) ἶρις ὅμοιος ὁράσει σμαραγδίνῳ a halo that was like an emerald (in appearance) some have proposed this mng. for Rv 4:3, but the reminiscence of Ezk 1:27f is decisively supportive of 1 above.—M-M. DELG. TW.

gen. gen. = genitive

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

Mel. Mel. = Melito of Sardis, II a.d.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

mng. mng. = meaning(s)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 480
